title: Exploration Region
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Exploration Region''' was the area of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] on which the explorer [[Reidi Artom]] chose to focus her scouting career. She was responsible for renewed interest in eight systems in the region, including the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Exploration Region was most likely a typo for the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]], as elsewhere in the same source, Cularin is said to be in the Expansion Region. It is possible, however, that the Exploration Region was a smaller subsection of the Expansion Region (maybe including some of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] as well) which had not been surveyed thoroughly.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-03-XX -->''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]''
